taxonomy_metadata.description: Skill taxonomy for the Vietnamese manufacturing sector covering machining, machine design/automation, chemistry/cosmetics R&D, garment/footwear, automotive R&D, technical trades, heavy equipment, quality management, production operations, maintenance, sales, and other manufacturing roles. Includes VN-specific regulatory flags: Luật ATVSLĐ 2015, Nghị định 44/2016, ISO/TCVN quality standards, vehicle registration, chemical safety (MSDS), LOTO procedures, PCCC, and packaging labelling (ND43/2017).
